description: A step-by-step DIY video demonstrating how to make a textured concrete planter. A woman pours wet cement into a custom mold created by an inner plastic bucket and an outer wall of stacked paper cups secured with red string. She presses colorful flat glass marbles into the top rim of the wet cement. Once dry, she cuts the string and pulls out the paper cups, revealing a solid concrete cylinder covered in unique circular indentations. She paints the exterior green. The video concludes by showing three finished planters painted green, yellow, and pink, each holding bright, blooming flowers on a balcony.
